text:
There lived an owl named Owlsley.

One autumn afternoon Owlsley sat upon a branch pondering aloud.

"I've read that things die," said Owlsley.

That didn't sit well with Owlsley. Something about that worried him.

He flew down to a nearby bush.

There lived a chipmunk.

Chipper?

A chipper life?

A chipper what?

Chipper about what?!

Owlsley sighed.

The world was full of loud creatures.

Even owls.

If Owlsley could only chatter…

Maybe that's why Owlsley hated chatting.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
